# pambrose-claude-plugins

> Personal Claude Code plugin marketplace by pambrose.

This repository is a Claude Code plugin marketplace. Each top-level directory is an independent plugin, and `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json` is the marketplace manifest.

## Plugins

### linear-integration (v1.8.0)

Find Linear issues, fix them autonomously in isolated worktrees, and request Codex CLI reviews.

**Commands:**
- `/fix-linear-issue` ‚Äî Fix a Linear issue in an isolated worktree
- `/fix-and-create-pr-linear-issue` ‚Äî Fix a Linear issue in a worktree, create tests, simplify, commit, and open a GitHub PR
- `/show-linear-issues` ‚Äî Display Linear issues in "Todo" status sorted by priority
- `/cancel-linear-issue` ‚Äî Cancel Linear issues by setting status to Cancelled
- `/codex-review` ‚Äî Ask Codex CLI to independently review a Linear issue
- `/linear-plugin-version` ‚Äî Show installed plugin version

**Skills:**
- `create-linear-bug-issues` ‚Äî Review codebase for bugs and create Linear issues
- `create-linear-design-issues` ‚Äî Review codebase for design problems and create Linear issues
- `create-linear-idiom-issues` ‚Äî Review codebase for non-idiomatic code and create Linear issues

**Agents:**
- `issue-fixer` ‚Äî Autonomous agent that fixes Linear issues in isolated worktrees
- `issue-pr-creator` ‚Äî Autonomous agent that fixes issues, creates tests, runs simplify, and opens GitHub PRs

### ide-integration (v1.6.0)

Open IDEs and tools directly from Claude Code.

**Commands:**
- `/claude` ‚Äî Open Claude desktop app
- `/codex` ‚Äî Open Codex editor
- `/cursor` ‚Äî Open Cursor editor
- `/vscode` ‚Äî Open Visual Studio Code
- `/intellij` ‚Äî Open IntelliJ IDEA
- `/pycharm` ‚Äî Open PyCharm
- `/clion` ‚Äî Open CLion
- `/rustrover` ‚Äî Open RustRover
- `/datagrip` ‚Äî Open DataGrip
- `/zed` ‚Äî Open Zed editor
- `/warp` ‚Äî Open Warp terminal
- `/ghostty` ‚Äî Open Ghostty terminal
- `/terminal` ‚Äî Open macOS Terminal
- `/finder` ‚Äî Open macOS Finder
- `/open-github` ‚Äî Open current repo on GitHub
- `/open-gitlab` ‚Äî Open current repo on GitLab

### osx-integration (v0.4.0)

macOS system integration ‚Äî clipboard, notifications, text-to-speech, screenshots, and phone dialing.

**Commands:**
- `/clipboard` ‚Äî Read from or write to the macOS clipboard
- `/dial` ‚Äî Look up a contact in macOS Contacts and dial via Continuity/FaceTime
- `/notify` ‚Äî Send a macOS desktop notification
- `/say` ‚Äî Speak text aloud using macOS text-to-speech
- `/screenshot` ‚Äî Take a screenshot

## Structure

```
pambrose-claude-plugins/
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ .claude-plugin/
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ marketplace.json
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ linear-integration/
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ .claude-plugin/plugin.json
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ commands/
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ agents/
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ skills/
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ ide-integration/
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ .claude-plugin/plugin.json
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ commands/
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ osx-integration/
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ .claude-plugin/plugin.json
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ commands/
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ CLAUDE.md
‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ llms.txt
```

## Installation

Install via Claude Code:

```
claude install-plugin https://github.com/pambrose/pambrose-claude-plugins
```
